channel.title: Synced on Glyphack
channel.description: Recent content in Synced on Glyphack

item.title: How to Win Friends and Influence People
item.description: I found this book in the street. I wish I could say it changed my life, sadly that would be an exaggeration. I started reading it and it’s really good. It reminds some things that people forget easily. So far I’m being nicer to people. Say hello and smile. Let them talk and be a good listener. I finished the book. Overall it did not provide new insights. I think I’ve heard all the tips about letting people talk about themselves and looking through lens of others.
